---
name: Feature request
about: A new feature, capability, or significant change
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want to do
<!-- The user-facing thing this would unlock — phrased as a goal, not a
solution. "Track my HSA contributions separately" rather than "add an
HSA-only column to the budget table." -->

## Why it matters
<!-- Briefly: what becomes possible / easier / less painful that isn't
today. If you've worked around it in spreadsheets, mention how. -->

## Sketch (optional)
<!-- If you have a concrete proposal — a UI mockup, an API sketch, a
math formula — drop it here. Not required: a clear "what + why" is
often enough for the maintainer to propose the right shape. -->

## Out of scope
<!-- Anything you specifically don't want this issue to bundle in.
Useful for keeping the conversation focused. -->
